title: WLIB
description: Static utility library built for dynamic bukkit plugins
body:
WLIB

Static utility library built for dynamic bukkit plugins

WLIB is a utility library for bukkit servers that simplifies common plugin development tasks and reduces repetitive boilerplate code. Features include: * Dynamic command registration * Static event management * Plugin management APIs * Debug and development tools * Reflection and compatibility helpers * Cross-platform Bukkit/Paper/Folia support * General-purpose utility classes for plugin development WLIB is intended as a lightweight developer library and is primarily used across projects from WebMC Development.
